title: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery | Dimensional
gist: This is a regulatory/operational disclosure page describing Dimensional's Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery (BC/DR) Program (geographically diverse sites, redundant power, primary plus backup data centers, tiered system restoration, annual exercises). It contains no investment thesis or market view; emitted as an honest light card noting it is boilerplate operational disclosure with negligible investing edge.

insights.claim: Dimensional maintains a Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Program built on geographic diversity, redundant power generators, a secure primary data center plus a separate backup data center, and tiered restoration of systems by criticality after an outage.
insights.speaker: Dimensional Fund Advisors
insights.so_what: Operational due-diligence detail for an allocator vetting Dimensional as a manager; no market or investment signal.
insights.quote: Dimensional has a secure primary data center and a backup data center in separate locations.
